original_image_tags: Reverse side of a typed document, showing bleed-through text from the front of the page. The paper is aged, off-white, with two hole-punch marks at the top. Three ink stamps are applied in the lower right quadrant.
Faint, reversed text from the other side of the page is visible through the paper, but it is not legible enough for transcription.

elements.description: The page shows the reverse side of a document with faint, mirrored text visible through the paper. There are two hole-punch marks at the top, a blue stamp in the lower right reading 'RECEIVED-L.A. DIV. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE F.B.I. DEC 28 3 55 PM '48', and a blue stamp reading 'RECENDED JAN 6 2 54 PM '48' with partially obscured text above it.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, detailed verbatim text from stamps that Description A says are not legible for transcription, indicating at least one side is likely hallucinating text from low-confidence pixels.
